purpose: Policy-as-data for Forge (Problem Generator) problem validation and difficulty calibration

never_generate: Problems where answer is unknowable (underdetermined systems)
Practice sets without conceptual learning objective

structural_soundness_checks.method: Symbolic solver (SymPy); all steps must be reversible
All variables tagged with SI units; check dimensionless ratios match expected form
structural_soundness_checks.failure_action: Reject problem; add constraint to generator

structural_soundness_checks.method: Check answer magnitude vs. domain expectations (e.g., current < 10A for typical circuits, frequencies < 1GHz for benchtop)
Does answer depend on itself or on unknown intermediate? DAG check.
Is answer deterministic or multiple valid answers? Clarify in problem statement.
structural_soundness_checks.failure_action: Add clarification or accept multiple answers with rubric

validation_confidence.action_on_low: Do not present; regenerate or escalate to human

inputs: Student's prior mastery on this topic (from Prism)
Student's success history on similar difficulty levels
Cognitive load estimation (number of steps, formula complexity)

difficulty_calculation.cognitive_load: Estimated working memory burden (0–1 scale based on steps + formula density)

adaptive_difficulty_rule.if_success_2_of_3: Bump difficulty by +0.15 next problem set
adaptive_difficulty_rule.if_failure_2_of_3: Lower difficulty by −0.15 next problem set

expected_learning_gain.topic_importance: Weight of this topic toward course goal (0–1, from Pathfinder)
expected_learning_gain.novelty: Bonus if problem combines topics student hasn't seen together (+0.1)

cognitive_load_check.rule: If cognitive_load > 0.7, split problem into sub-problems or offer scaffolding hints
scaffolding_types: Simplified version (easier first, then add complexity)

ranking_problem_sets.rank_by: Expected learning gain (60%) + cognitive load fit (20%) + topic diversity (20%)
ranking_problem_sets.diversity_rule: Avoid 5 problems all on same narrow subtopic; mix across 2–3 subtopics
ranking_problem_sets.example: If mastering 'mesh current analysis', include: (1) 2-loop mesh, (2) 3-loop mesh, (3) mesh + source transformation, (4) mesh + dependent source

problem_set_limits.gate_message: You've solved X problems already. More practice? (Generate 3 more / Take break / Review concepts)
problem_set_limits.session_duration_warning: If generating > 30 min of estimated work, warn student

topic_diversity_enforcement.rule: Don't return problem set where > 60% of problems target single topic
topic_diversity_enforcement.enforcement: If diversity check fails, rerank or regenerate to include related topics

every_problem_must_include: Why this problem (topic connections, learning objective)
Full worked solution with every step
every_problem_set_must_include: Total estimated time and cognitive load
Next steps recommendation (more practice / review concepts / move on)

unusual_difficulty_spike.gate_message: This problem is much harder than your recent attempts. Want to tackle it or ease up?

unusual_topic_combination.trigger: Problem requires 3+ prerequisites not yet mastered (mastery < 0.65)
unusual_topic_combination.gate_message: This problem assumes you know [Topic A], [Topic B], [Topic C], but you're weaker on [B] and [C]. Recommend review first?

validation_failure.gate_message: Problem generation had an issue (e.g., answer is not unique). Regenerating...

when_mastery_too_low.trigger: Student requests hard problem but mastery < 0.40
when_mastery_too_low.action: Suggest: 'You might struggle here. Review [prerequisite] first with Sage, then try medium difficulty?'

when_validation_fails_repeatedly.action: Escalate to human: 'I had trouble generating a valid problem on this topic. Your instructor might need to create one.'

when_no_problems_available.trigger: Topic not in problem database (e.g., brand-new topic)
when_no_problems_available.action: Offer: 'I don't have practice problems yet for [topic]. Ask Sage for explanation, then write your own? (Offer template)'

log_every: Learning gain ranking (sorted by expected gain)
